recentTweets.text:
Our first responders are heroes. They deserve the best.

I'm proud to have delivered more than $1 million for the Ulster County Emergency Operations Center, which will serve as a command hub for our agencies to coordinate their vital work keeping us safe. https://t.co/owfMDy4GVU

Democratic veterans have spent weeks fighting to stop a bill that would represent the largest cut to veterans’ benefits in history, including cutting benefits for common conditions like tinnitus and sleep apnea and raising fees on VA home loans.

Today, Republicans were forced to https://t.co/L07ZcuIl5o

From the oldest section of the Appalachian Trail to following in the footsteps of President Franklin Roosevelt in Hyde Park, NY-18 has some magnificent places to visit this National Parks & Rec month! https://t.co/c6MvEF9SUI

The Hudson Valley is experiencing unhealthy air quality today from Canadian wildfires.

Please limit your time outdoors, drink plenty of water, & consider wearing a mask to protect yourself.

You can monitor the real-time Air Quality Index at https://t.co/rgAszV70YU.

Stay

I’ve heard from countless local veterans about how devastating the impacts of this would be in the Hudson Valley – I’m proudly standing with them and voting NO on this betrayal.
https://t.co/fkPXjxVCQf

Taking care of the heroes who risked their lives for this country is not a partisan issue – it’s a fundamental American value.

We shouldn’t have to tear critical benefits away from our nation’s heroes to fund programs for others – especially not when the Pentagon has a $1.5

Brave men and women sign up to serve because they trust us to have their backs. They trust that when they get home, the country they fought for will be ready to embrace them.

This bill is the GOP’s latest attempt to break that sacred trust. https://t.co/XPKJK89Dqx

The Hudson Valley was on the forefront of American independence 250 years ago.

That revolutionary spirit lives on today – especially in our next generation of leaders. I’m so excited to see what they submit for my America 250 Essay Contest.

Learn more & submit by August 31st!! https://t.co/aWKg8hmrKv

Do you need help navigating federal programs, contacting the IRS, or accessing your benefits? Stop by one of my team’s C.A.R.E.S. Van stops!

Today, we’ll be in Newburgh.

Hope to see you there, details below! https://t.co/iOIHaNtxch

Together, the Hudson Valley is standing on the side of justice, accountability, and humanity – and whether in Newburgh, Chester, or anywhere else, we won’t stand idly by while ICE makes us all less safe.

Make YOUR voice heard: https://t.co/r228trG84W

Under Trump, ICE has a budget that is larger than most other countries’ militaries – and they’ve used it to kill law-abiding Americans, kidnap children, deport veterans, and terrorize our communities.

We have a very simple message for Trump, Homan, Mullin and the rest of them:

Our community strongly rejects ICE moving into the Hudson Valley.

It’s shameful, un-American, and the exact opposite of everything we stand for.

When Trump tried to build a facility in Chester, we rallied with one voice to stop it – and we’re ready to do the same thing again. https://t.co/pGiQXT84wh

The crowd that gathered last week speaks for itself. USPS owes the Hudson Valley better, and our community will keep fighting to save the West Park post office and ensure our neighbors don’t get left behind: 
https://t.co/72ij9aILmu

In just a few days since launching the petition, I’ve heard from seniors worried about picking up their medication, small business owners who rely on the shipping services, and most of all from neighbors, worried about losing this center of their community. 

We need to make sure

For many communities in the Hudson Valley, the U.S. Postal Service is a lifeline. 

That’s especially the case in West Park where it’s one of the few meeting places in town. 

The way that the community has jumped into action has been so inspiring. https://t.co/UGRquxKHJ6

I was honored to speak at today's Ulster County naturalization ceremony in Kingston!

To the 16 new citizens – congratulations to each and every one of you 🇺🇸!

And thank you to County Clerk Bruck for organizing & inviting me to speak. https://t.co/pF71quxke8

Do you need help navigating federal programs, contacting the IRS, or accessing your benefits? Stop by one of my team’s C.A.R.E.S. Van stops!

Today, we’ll be in Tuxedo Park.

Hope to see you there, details below! https://t.co/WkYHE17jmu

On this day 158 years ago, the 14th Amendment was ratified.

We only experience the fullness of democracy so long as each and every one of our fellow Americans does.

Today and every day, we must recommit to the fight for equality. https://t.co/oa1pcmL0io

Had a great time celebrating America's 250th Birthday with local law enforcement, first responders, and community members at the Town of Crawford's National Night Out this week! 

Thank you to Chief Blasko for organizing & inviting me to join. https://t.co/SNd1xwKvkV

Whether by delivering funding to fight contamination on the ground, holding corporations accountable for polluting our communities, or by fighting tooth and nail against harmful EPA or DoD policies rolling back our progress, I’ll keep working to end this public health crisis once

I’m incredibly proud to secure this funding for the Town of Wappinger to update their water filtration systems & improve water quality.

We’re ensuring that everyone in our Hudson Valley community – especially our kids – has access to safe, clean drinking water. https://t.co/tdKRa6bSA4

Our Hudson Valley community is mourning the loss of Cottekill Fire Chief David Gagnon. 

An Army veteran, 9/11 first responder, and father, Chief Gagnon gave his life in the line of duty. 

Our first responders are heroes of the highest order. We owe them an immense debt of

Great to spend some time in Beacon at Dutchess County’s Office for Aging Senior Picnic today!! 

Special thanks to Beacon High School for lending their gym. https://t.co/YYzWr4FMJl

If you need help navigating federal programs, contacting the IRS, or accessing your benefits, stop by one of my team’s C.A.R.E.S. Van stops!

Today, we’re in Beacon.

Hope to see you there, details below! https://t.co/cqFmcA7z7F

For weeks now, we’ve been pushing at every level an official Disaster Designation that would unlock millions of dollars in emergency grants and resources to help farmers and growers begin to recover from the estimated $30 million loss.

I’ll keep fighting tooth and nail to make

The freeze this spring was absolutely devastating to our Hudson Valley farmers & growers.

Seeing the damage firsthand makes clear we need urgent action. Many of our apple growers told me they lost nearly 100% of their crop.

It’s time for USDA to step up & do their job – now. https://t.co/jgLYgIPYvq

Do you need help navigating federal programs, contacting the IRS, or accessing your benefits?

Stop by the Town of Crawford’s National Night Out & America 250 Celebration tonight to get direct, one-on-one assistance from my C.A.R.E.S. Van team!

Details below! https://t.co/oXwxE5DMfc

The Hudson Valley is under flood watch starting tonight. 

You can sign up for NY-Alert here to stay up to date on heavy rainfall in your area: https://t.co/rYfNWim0Y5

Stay informed, stay alert, and stay safe!

Perfect end to a very special Independence Day. 

Every year, I love joining the cadets at West Point to watch the fireworks with Rebecca & the boys, and celebrate the great American experiment 🇺🇸🌦️ https://t.co/fknpvFYQKi

Wishing everyone across the Hudson Valley a Happy Fourth of July!

Today, we celebrate 250 years of our nation’s founding principles of freedom & democracy, and honor everyone fighting to these ideals, from 1776 through today. https://t.co/D53aHsShU1

From the very beginning, the Trump Administration has refused to be transparent with our community.

We’ve made it clear: we strongly reject a mass detention center or any ICE facility in the Hudson Valley.

I’m urgently seeking answers to figure out exactly what their plan is.

Because if the Administration thinks they can quietly build this without the force of our community fighting back, they’ve got another thing coming.

When they tried to build a facility in Chester, we rallied with one voice to stop it.

Together, the Hudson Valley is standing on the side of justice, accountability, and humanity – and whether in Newburgh, Chester, or anywhere else, we won’t stand idly by while ICE moves into our community, terrorizes our neighbors, and makes us all less safe.

The Hudson Valley has a profoundly rich history of Patriotism and service to this great country.

As we celebrate the first 250 years of American history, we must also look forward to the next 250.

This Independence Day, it’s important to remember what unites us: our kids, our

Our community was on the forefront of American independence 250 years ago, and that revolutionary spirit lives on today – especially in our next generation of leaders.

That’s why I’m so excited to launch my America 250 Essay Contest, and hear from the exceptional young people of https://t.co/t3ef6x2YIg

Happy #NationalPostalWorkersDay NY-18!

Thank you to all of the hardworking public servants who keep our community connected.

As a proud @Labor_Caucus member, I’ll always fight for Hudson Valley postal workers. https://t.co/1eyXU8cY2D

Today, alongside our West Park community, I’m launching a petition to save the post office.

We cannot allow USPS to rip the rug out from under our neighbors – that’s why we’re fighting back. https://t.co/YqjqWDDLk6

Over the past week, I’ve heard from seniors concerned about where to pick up their medication, small business owners who rely on the shipping services, and most of all from neighbors, worried about losing this center of their community.

USPS owes the Hudson Valley better, and our community is ready to rally in force to save the West Park post office and ensure our neighbors don’t get left behind.

Make your voice heard: https://t.co/7cFT5lQLhW

Last week, my team honored Grace Martin, Michael Martin, & Gregory Popp at the Dutchess County Office of the Aging’s Volunteer Recognition!

Thank you all for your incredible dedication to supporting local seniors. You are the pride of our community—congratulations! https://t.co/Tx7g1c5ibj

This should have been a moment for all of us to work together and keep our kids safe online. Instead, Big Tech and their army of lobbyists hijacked and watered down what was previously a common-sense bipartisan bill. 

I voted no on behalf of parents across our community, myself

THIS WEEK the Hudson Valley will be under an extreme heat warning, with temperatures breaking triple digits starting Wednesday. 

Remember to stay hydrated, check on your family & neighbors, and limit your time outside. 

Find a cooling center near you: https://t.co/svGZZ2T4Fe

My team was honored to attend the ribbon cutting celebrating Bannerman Island Trust’s amazing restoration of their historic Grotto.

Special thanks to NYS Parks, Rec and Historic Preservation & the Hudson Valley River Greenway for your support of this incredible gem of #NY18! https://t.co/OLP6hwNfqn

My staff was honored to attend the Kiwanis Club’s first annual Flags for Heroes ceremony in Minisink Valley, celebrating our incredible Hudson Valley veterans. 

Thank you to everyone who showed up to thank our community’s heroes – and thank you to our vets for your service! https://t.co/BUOCNZfzn0

Had a great time at the Orange County police chiefs picnic this week! 

We owe our police officers an immense debt of gratitude for all their do to keep our communities safe. 

Thank you to Chief Blasko, Chief Ewanciw, and Chief Rader for hosting & inviting me to join. https://t.co/y98JF5s2Cc

Every American – especially our kids – deserves to have clean drinking water.

I’m fighting hard at every level to deliver the support and resources our communities need – including in this year’s NDAA.

But we’re still facing a public health crisis in the Hudson Valley, and the

I’ll work with anyone to hold polluters accountable and make sure all our families have access to clean water – and I’ll fight like hell against anyone who stands in our way.
https://t.co/amulox4WNh

For years we’ve been fighting hard to ensure clean, safe drinking water is available in every Hudson Valley community, including those around Stewart Air National Guard Base.

But now, inexplicably, Hegseth’s DoD is doing the opposite, blowing up decades of bipartisan progress. https://t.co/DX9iZkh62h

The U.S. Postal Service is not a luxury. For many communities in the Hudson Valley, it is a lifeline. That’s especially the case in West Park where it’s one of the few meeting places in town. We cannot allow USPS to rip the rug out from under our neighbors – that’s why we’re https://t.co/6R39uYqIl8

Everyone in the Hudson Valley – no matter where they live – deserves access to top-notch postal services right in their own community. Our postal workers deserve to work where they live. USPS owes the Hudson Valley better, and our community is ready to rally in force to save the

June is National Dairy Month!

Let’s raise a glass of milk to all the hardworking dairy farmers across the Hudson Valley & the entire country! 🐮🥛 https://t.co/ca0Rew6Djh

The 4th anniversary of the egregious Dobbs decision serves as a stark reminder that the far-right will stop at nothing to ban abortion nationwide.

As long as these extremists continue their campaign to rip away reproductive rights, we’ll continue our fight to protect them. https://t.co/CKFGs4OiYt

If you need help navigating federal programs, contacting the IRS, or accessing your benefits, stop by one of my team’s C.A.R.E.S. Van stops! 

Tomorrow, we’ll be in Wappingers Falls.

Hope to see you there, details below! https://t.co/mBJpomnK0O

The Hudson Valley is a home for everyone - no matter who you are or who you love.

Proud to work alongside the Hudson Valley @lgbtqcenter to commemorate Pride Month.

As a proud co-sponsor of the Equality Act, I’ll always fight for the rights of every member of our community. https://t.co/YcsaErTGsh

At West Point, I learned to live a life grounded in Duty, Honor, & Country.

It’s a privilege each year to nominate the best of the Hudson Valley to our US Service Academies.

If you’re interested in finding YOUR path to service, reach out to my office!
https://t.co/tc9oSZzVTQ https://t.co/O3K6djGB17

82 years ago today, we passed the GI Bill, making higher education accessible for millions of veterans.

As Co-Chair of the Dem Vets Caucus & amid unprecedented threats to veterans benefits, I’ll always fight for my fellow veterans to get the benefits they earned.

I am consistently so impressed with Hudson Valley students, and I think this is a great way to recognize them and their commitment to education.

Sign up below!
https://t.co/PcffVbrkdQ

Summer reading keeps kids curious, confident, and connected — it’s how we make sure every child comes back to school ready to thrive.

Whether you’re enjoying one of our beautiful parks or making a splash at a Hudson Valley pool this summer vacation, make sure you bring a book! https://t.co/YgHTNrVjDN

Had a great time in Kingston today celebrating Juneteenth! 

Everyday, we must commit to learning from the past & honoring those who fought for freedom.

Thank you to Harambee for organizing & inviting me to such a meaningful celebration. https://t.co/7jKr2zFiBA

Great to join our community in Poughkeepsie today for a powerful Juneteenth celebration! 

Juneteenth is a day to remember how much progress we've made as a country, but also a reminder of how much further we have to go in the fight for true freedom and equality for all. https://t.co/EclsuUh0Qx

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

I’ve been fighting alongside our Wappingers community, especially Fishkill Supervisor Ozzy Albra, to ensure that Chief Nimham receives the long-overdue recognition he deserves for his sacrifice to our country.

The Purple Heart is our military’s highest honor.

It would help honor Chief Nimham’s extraordinary service, courage, and ultimate sacrifice, while ensuring that future generations understand the indispensable role Native Americans played in securing our nation’s freedom.

The Hudson Valley is home to a rich history of American heroes who signed up to serve because they believed in the Patriot cause.

Wappinger Chief Daniel Nimham is one of those heroes, giving his life in the Revolutionary War so that we may all be free.
